LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT CAMILA NAVES' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS OFF CALENDAR AS PREMATURE. MOVING PARTY DID NOT GIVE NOTICE TO OPPOSING COUNSEL OF HER INTENT TO APPEAR. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANT CAMILA NAVES' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS OFF CALENDAR AS PREMATURE. Moving party did not give notice to opposing counsel of her intent to appear. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/EH)
